attributes.name: IDP-15
attributes.description:
IDP-15 Dry Scroll Pump

The Agilent IDP-15 dry scroll pump is an oil-free, compact, low noise, high performance, isolated vacuum pump. It provides exceptionally quiet, vibration-free, rapid pump down, making it suitable for applications in the reseach, analytical instrument, and laboratory markets.

IDP pumps are hermetic, with the motor and bearings completely isolated from the vacuum path in a design that extends bearing life and provides clean, dry vacuum. IDP pumps use a single-sided scroll design that offers a 15-minute maintenance procedure. The optional fail safe isolation valve prevents accidental contamination and adds no extra height to the pump.

Base pressure (50 Hz) - Torr & mbar

  • 1.3 x 10-2 mbar

  • 1 x 10-2 Torr

Base pressure (60 Hz) - Torr & mbar

  • 1.3 x 10-2 mbar

  • 1 x 10-2 Torr

Dimensions (WxHxL)

  • 13.1 in x 14.3 in x 19.1 in

Exhaust Connection

  • NW16

Height

  • 14.3 in

Inlet Connection

  • NW25

Input Voltage

  • 100-115

  • 220-230 VAC

Length

  • 19.1 in

Maximum Inlet Pressure

  • 1.0 atm (0 psig)

Noise Level

  • 50 dB(A)

Operating Environment Temperature

  • 5 to 40 °C

  • 41 to 104 °F

Pumping Speed (50 Hz)

  • 12.8 m3/h

  • 214 L/min

  • 7.5 CFM

Pumping Speed (60 Hz)

  • 15.4 m3/h

  • 256 L/min

  • 9.1 CFM

Shipping Weight

  • 54 kg

  • 118 lbs

Weight (pump only)

  • 66 lbs

Width

  • 13.1 in
